message.content:
@startuml
title Scheduled Events

actor "Recording Staff" as RS1
participant Coach as C1
box "" #LightBlue2
  participant IP/MobileCams as IMC1
end box
package ConsumerApps {
    participant Apps as A1 
}
database SecurityGateway as SGW1


RS1 -> ControlDomain : createEvent(configuration{description, sources, consumers{priorities}}) 

activate ControlDomain  
ControlDomain->StreamingService:create(newEvent)    
deactivate StreamingService   
return()     
deactivate ControlDomain  

alt auto-download enabled [auto-downloaded]
   activate RecordingStaff      
      Recorder --> MediaStorage: fetchMedia(token, mediaID)       
       returnByPriority(mediaStream)        
     deactivate RecordingStaff         
else manual download[manual -downloaded ]          
        showmedia( token )           
endif         



@enduml
